---
title: "05 Tables and Figures Shells"
author: "Research Team"
date: today
format:
  docx: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Table 1. Data Sources and Variables

| Source | Years | Unit | Outcome Variables | Parent Variables | Household Variables | Geography | Weights | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| LiTS II | 2010 | Respondent | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| LiTS III | 2016 | Respondent | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| LiTS IV | 2022-23 | Respondent/Child module | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| HBS | [fill] | Household | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Admin | [fill] | Region-year | [fill] | NA | [fill] | [fill] | NA | [fill] |

## Table 2. Mobility Measures by Wave

| Measure | 2010 | 2016 | 2022-23 | Change 2010 to 2022-23 | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Rank-rank slope | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Upward mobility rate | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Downward mobility rate | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Persistence probability | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |

## Table 3. Mobility by Subgroup

| Subgroup | Category | 2010 | 2016 | 2022-23 | Difference (latest minus earliest) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Urban/rural | Urban | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Urban/rural | Rural | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Gender | Male | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Gender | Female | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Cohort | 25-34 | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Cohort | 35-44 | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Cohort | 45-54 | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Cohort | 55-64 | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |

## Table 4. Correlates of Mobility

| Variable | OLS on Years of Schooling (coef) | OLS p-value | Logit Upward Mobility (coef) | Logit p-value | Interpretation |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Parental education | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Urban | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Gender | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Income proxy | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Migration exposure | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Multigenerational household | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |

## Table 5. Pandemic Mechanism Results (LiTS IV)

| Outcome | Overall Rate | Lower Parent Education | Higher Parent Education | Baseline Weighted Model (parent term) | Robustness Summary |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| Switched to online learning | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| School closed without online | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Education stopped due to COVID | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Any remote-learning challenge | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |
| Shared device use | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] | [fill] |

## Figure 1. Transition Matrix
- Placeholder: parent education by child education heatmap.
- Final file: `outputs/figures/[fill_transition_matrix].png`

## Figure 2. Rank-Rank Slope by Wave
- Placeholder: line plot across 2010, 2016, 2022-23.
- Final file: `outputs/figures/tier_a_rank_rank_by_wave.png`

## Figure 3. Regional Mobility Map
- Placeholder: choropleth of mobility metric by region.
- Final file: `outputs/figures/[fill_regional_map].png`

## Figure 4. Heterogeneity by Urban/Rural and Gender
- Placeholder: grouped lines or bars for subgroup differences over time.
- Final file: `outputs/figures/[fill_heterogeneity_plot].png`
